---
title: "Exhibitions"
subtitle: "Sprengel Museum Hannover — Exhibition Catalogue Records"
execute:
  echo: true
jupyter: python3
---

This page queries the project Wikibase instance live to display all uploaded Sprengel Museum exhibition catalogue records.

> **Note:** The Wikibase SPARQL endpoint must be reachable when this page is rendered. If the endpoint returns no results, the pipeline notebooks (01–05) may not have been run yet.

```{python}
#| label: load-config
#| echo: false
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from pathlib import Path

load_dotenv(Path(".env"))
WB_URL = os.getenv("WB_URL", "https://wikibase.wbworkshop.tibwiki.io")
SPARQL_ENDPOINT = f"{WB_URL}/query/sparql"
print(f"Querying: {SPARQL_ENDPOINT}")
```

```{python}
#| label: sparql-query
import requests
import pandas as pd

SPARQL = """
SELECT ?item ?itemLabel ?idn ?year ?url WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P1 wd:Q1 .
  OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P7 ?idn . }
  OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P10 ?year . }
  OPTIONAL { ?item wdt:P856 ?url . }
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en,de". }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
"""

try:
    resp = requests.get(
        SPARQL_ENDPOINT,
        params={"query": SPARQL, "format": "json"},
        headers={"Accept": "application/sparql-results+json"},
        timeout=30,
    )
    resp.raise_for_status()
    bindings = resp.json()["results"]["bindings"]

    rows = []
    for b in bindings:
        qid   = b["item"]["value"].split("/")[-1]
        label = b.get("itemLabel", {}).get("value", "—")
        idn   = b.get("idn", {}).get("value", "")
        year  = b.get("year", {}).get("value", "")[:4] if b.get("year") else ""
        url   = b.get("url", {}).get("value", "")
        rows.append({"QID": qid, "Title": label, "Year": year, "DNB IDN": idn, "DNB Link": url})

    df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    print(f"Records returned: {len(df)}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f"SPARQL query failed: {e}")
    df = pd.DataFrame(columns=["QID", "Title", "Year", "DNB IDN", "DNB Link"])
```

```{python}
#| label: display-table
from IPython.display import display, HTML

if df.empty:
    print("No records found. Run the pipeline notebooks (01–05) first.")
else:
    def make_link(row):
        wb  = f'<a href="{WB_URL}/wiki/{row["QID"]}" target="_blank">{row["QID"]}</a>'
        dnb = f'<a href="{row["DNB Link"]}" target="_blank">DNB</a>' if row["DNB Link"] else ""
        return pd.Series({"Wikibase": wb, "Title": row["Title"], "Year": row["Year"],
                          "DNB IDN": row["DNB IDN"], "DNB": dnb})

    display_df = df.apply(make_link, axis=1)
    display(HTML(display_df.to_html(escape=False, index=False)))
```

## SPARQL query used

The query above retrieves all items from the Wikibase instance that are classified as `Exhibition Catalogue` (`instance of` = Q1 in the default data model — adjust Q/P IDs after running Notebook 04). Results are sorted by year descending.

You can run this query directly at the Wikibase SPARQL interface:
[Open in Wikibase Query Service](`{python} f"{WB_URL}/query"`)
